mapper.sql: id, TO_CHAR(meeting_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS meeting_date, meeting_no, status, title, TO_CHAR(start_time, 'HH24:MI') AS start_time, TO_CHAR(end_time, 'HH24:MI') AS end_time, attendees, carryforward_notes, general_notes, total_work_orders, total_quantity, total_area, assigned_count
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hkgn.daily_production_meeting WHERE meeting_date = TO_DATE(#{meetingDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT FROM hkgn.daily_production_meeting ORDER BY meeting_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE hkgn.daily_production_meeting SET title = #{title}, attendees = #{attendees}, carryforward_notes = #{carryforwardNotes}, general_notes = #{generalNotes}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE hkgn.daily_production_meeting SET status = #{status},
start_time = #{startTime}::TIME,
end_time = #{endTime}::TIME,
updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE hkgn.daily_production_meeting SET total_work_orders = #{totalWorkOrders}, total_quantity = #{totalQuantity}, total_area = #{totalArea}, assigned_count = #{assignedCount}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
